title: Soulful Japa: Session 48 : Nourishment for Soul: 16 Attentive Rounds!
speaker: HG Madhu Pandit Dasa

segments.text: Welcome all of you for the 48th session of Soulful Japaan.
Yesterday, we discussed about content in module 15, 14 and 15 put together, wherein the most
important point of Srila Prabhupada giving us two processes to be simultaneously be followed.
To achieve perfection in life, one is the Bhagavata vidhi and the other is the Pancharatrika vidhi.
Bhagavata vidhi is a process of Japa, hearing Bhagavatam, hearing Bhagavata Keetaa, is a
process of Shravanam and Kirtanam.
Then, Shravanam, Kirtanam, Vishnu, Smaranam, Archanam, Archanam, Prabhupada also gave us
Deity worship and also serving the Lord, Dasyam, serving the Lord.
So, anyway, Pancharatrika vidhi and Bhagavata vidhi.
Okay.
Okay.
that Kali Yuga, the Yuga Dharma is through Sankirtana of the Hare Krishna Mahamantra.

My original consciousness is not this world consciousness.
My original consciousness is Krishna consciousness, which is natural to me.

the process of like we are doing Japa.
